title: NERV White Paper RPG
wikitext:
[]: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by bullitt » Mon Mar 16, 2020 8:41 am Hello everyone! I started translating the NERV White Paper RPG sourcebook, as I could not find a translated version anywhere. Before I go reinventing the wheel, could you confirm that? Also, I realised that there are only a few pages available online. Is there anyone who has the full scan? Or do the missing pages do not matter? I'm naturally happy to share the translations afterwards. Thank you!

[]: Re: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Mar 16, 2020 10:03 am As far as I'm aware, a select few passages have been translated a while ago, but never anything resembling the full thing. I'd be happy to help track down the missing scans, which ones do you have?

[]: Re: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 16, 2020 10:17 am As far as I know, all available scans were provided by me, mid-00s or so. I still have the book, but my scanner is one of those tiny things where you have to physically hold the book against the glass for two minutes per page -- obviously I'm not going to scan the whole thing. Looks like the scans I made were dumped here .

[]: Re: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by bullitt » Mon Mar 16, 2020 11:30 am Thank you both, and thank you Reichu for uploading the scans in the first place. I can understand, it's quite a tedious and time consuming activity! I was mostly interested in Chapter 4, the one detailing the story but I will keep being on the lookout for any other source I might stumble upon.

[]: Re: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Feb 18, 2021 3:14 pm Someone translated both White Paper as well as the sequel, Descent of Angel: Nerv White Paper Descent of Angel EDIT: The same person also did all three of theMagius series! Book 1: Decisive Battle in Tokyo-3 Book 2: Angel Approaches Book 3: Angel, Defeated!

[]: Re: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Feb 19, 2021 2:08 pm Blockio wrote: Someone translated both White Paper as well as the sequel, Descent of Angel: Nerv White Paper Descent of Angel EDIT: The same person also did all three of theMagius series! Book 1: Decisive Battle in Tokyo-3 Book 2: Angel Approaches Book 3: Angel, Defeated!

[]: Re: NERV White Paper (RPG)             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Sat Feb 20, 2021 3:26 am Getting into contact with Trotti could be a good idea, but how do you suggest we do it? As for E-Mono, I personally feel that we should probably wait on confirmation that we can actually even get the thing translated by someone.

Also, I realised that there are only a few pages available online. Is there anyone who has the full scan? Or do the missing pages do not matter? I'm naturally happy to share the translations afterwards. Thank you!
